headline: BCG Reports India Leads Healthcare AI
summary: A BCG report found that India leads global healthcare AI adoption, challenging assumptions about AI implementation leadership. The finding suggests U.S. health systems may benefit from studying international AI deployment strategies and best practices rather than focusing solely on domestic innovations.
so_what: BCG's finding that India leads global healthcare AI adoption challenges assumptions about where AI innovation happens. U.S. health systems may need to look internationally for AI implementation best practices.
original_title: India tops global AI healthcare adoption, BCG report finds | Tap to know more | Inshorts
